characters.name: Calder Voss
characters.notes: Former Greywood Ranger scout. Knows the Greywood better than anyone. Carries a grudge against the Ironmasks that predates the party.

characters.name: Wren Ashvale
characters.notes: Grew up in Ashford. Her father worked the Vein. The Ironmask toll drove him out. She came back to finish it.

characters.name: Sable
characters.notes: Wandering contractor. Does not explain who her patron is. Deeply effective in a crisis.

characters.name: Lira of the Dawn
characters.notes: Travelling healer who stopped in Ashford for one night and hasn't left. She knows what 'the Factor' means but hasn't said how.

characters.name: Osric Fynt
characters.notes: Trade Compact assessor who went rogue after discovering what the Compact actually knew about the Ironmasks.
